mapper.sql: id, task_id, total_working_hours, detection_type, user_id, user_name, working_hours, proportion, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into test_task_order_working_hours (id, task_id, total_working_hours, detection_type, user_id, user_name, working_hours, proportion, create_time, update_time,add_operator) values (id, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalWorkingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{detectionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{addOperator,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into test_task_order_working_hours
id,
task_id,
total_working_hours,
detection_type,
user_id,
user_name,
working_hours,
proportion,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalWorkingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{detectionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update test_task_order_working_hours
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
total_working_hours = #{totalWorkingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
detection_type = #{detectionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
working_hours = #{workingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
proportion = #{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_task_order_working_hours set task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_working_hours = #{totalWorkingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, detection_type = #{detectionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, working_hours = #{workingHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, proportion = #{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT t1.task_id, t1.total_working_hours AS working_hours, t2.receiver AS user_id, t2.state FROM test_task_order_working_hours AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_task AS t2 ON t1.task_id = t2.id
1=1
AND t2.receiver IN
#{id}
AND t2.order_time >= #{startDate}
AND #{stopDate} >= t2.required_completion_time
GROUP BY t1.task_id
